title: Highball Water Juice Tumbler Drinking Glasses Set of 6 280ml Hiball Glass Fruit Juice Cocktail Soda Shake Tumblers Long Beverage Soft Drink Glasses, Transparent, Home, Restaurant & Parties
features: Drinking tumblers are perfect for serving refreshing chilled juices, cocktails, lemonade, drink, water, or even alcohol. Crafted from transparent glass are these tumblers built with a 12-sided base and a faded ribbed pattern to a smooth drinking rim, for you to have a distinctive drinking tool versatile for various drinks and let your drinks shine as good as there taste!
These Glass Drinking Tumblers come as a Set Of 6. The MAXIMUM CAPACITY of each tumbler is 280ml. Dimensions of EACH TUMBLER ARE - Drinking Rim Diameter: 6cm, Base Diameter: 5.5cm & Height: 14cm.

280ML DRINKING GLASSES - Built from a single mould of glass are these hiball tumblers, for the smooth & reflective glass surface to catch any form of light and make your drinks visually appealing. Due to its dimensions, each tumbler has space to add in a drinking straw, lemon/lime/cucumber slices, mint, berries or ice to always serve desirable drinks with refreshing flavours.

EXCEL SERVING NEEDS – Highball drinking glasses with features to excel drink serving needs every time. Built with 1.5cm solid glass base will prevent glasses from tumbling, while the faded ribbed pattern shall give users a comfortable hold. And to let drinkers gain a smooth gulp of drink at every sip, the tumblers are built with a fine round drinking rim.

DURABLE GLASS STRUCTURE - For long term durability this set of drinking glasses are crafted from a single mould of transparent glass. From the top of the drinking rim to the base, the glass surface has a strong build, damage/abrasion resistance (chips/cracks/scratches), and smooth polished surface for strong light refraction and clarity.
